The Great Debaters (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $30,226,144Details
International Box Office $35,149
Worldwide Box Office $30,261,293
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $26,027,040
Total $26,027,040
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,005,180 (19.9% of total gross)
Legs:5.03 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,171 opening theaters/1,290 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $51,415,992

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2007 (Wide) by Weinstein Co.
Video Release: May 13th, 2008 by Weinstein Co./Genius
MPA Rating: PG-13 for depiction of strong thematic material including violence and disturbing images, and for language and brief sexuality
Running Time: 123 minutes
Plot point: African Americans, Biography, Inspirational Teacher, Intellectual Pursuits, Unions
Social setting: College
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Harpo Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
